name: World of Naples
short_description: Play single player or local co-op. Story mode or Brawler is up to you. Remote play with friends. Simple mechanics. 20 levels, 4 bosses, 6 PVP arenas.
detailed_description:
We wanted to keep this game old school. Bare minimum tutorial. Jump in and play.

Demo
https://couchbrogames.itch.io/world-of-naples-lite

World of Naples is a 2d platformer, speed runner, roguelike with Local PvP brawler. Up to 4 local players.

Features:
1-PVE: 20 levels total. Up to 4 players.
2-Local PVP: 6 arenas. Last man standing. Up to 4 players.
3-Keyboard, XBOX and PSP controller support.
4-REMOTE PLAY with your friends.
5-Plays nicely on Steam Deck.
6-Cute characters.
7-Challenging to hardcore gameplay.
8-Random quotes from great minds.
9-Old school. No Progress saved.
10-Gaming is easier with friends.

Better experience with Xbox or PSP controllers.

Thanks for reading.
Couch Bro Games.
